zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales於大約1007年出生在英國威爾斯尼德時，他的父親Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth28歲，母親Angharad ferch Maredudd27歲。他與Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1063年8月5日在英國威爾斯享年57歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾阿比-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales于大约1007年出生在英国威尔斯尼德时，他的父亲Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth28岁，母亲Angharad ferch Maredudd27岁。他与Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1063年8月5日在英国威尔斯享年57岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾阿比-爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales was born about 1007, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth, was 28 and his mother, Angharad ferch Maredudd, was 27. He married Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 5 August 1063, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Wales: Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales est né environ 1007, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Maredudd, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 août 1063, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales um 1007 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth 28 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Maredudd 27. Er hat Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. August 1063 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales è nato il circa 1007 nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Maredudd, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 5 agosto 1063, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Walesが約1007年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドで生まれた時，父Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarthは28歳，母Angharad ferch Mareduddは27歳であった。Ealdgyth Edith of Merciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1063年8月5日にイギリスウェールズで57歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズラドノーシュアイアアベイ-クウムヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales(이)가 대략 1007년 영국 웨일스 그윈드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Maredudd(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1063년 8월 5일 영국 웨일스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르 애브브이-cw히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales nasceu aproximadamente 1007, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Maredudd, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1063, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales родился около 1007 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Maredudd, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 5 августа 1063 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности эбби-квмхир, радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

sm.from 1055 to 1063: mai le 1055 e o'o I le 1063

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales nació aproximadamente 1007, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Maredudd, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1063, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Abbey-Cwmhir, Radnorshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
